name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: At 2212 4th St, Harvey, LA 70058, Cash America Pawn can be contacted at +1 504-366-3725.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store chain with over 3,300 retail locations. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers who need immediate liquidity or alternative financial services. FirstCash's massive scale and geographic reach make it one of the most accessible pawn networks in North America and internationally.

FirstCash's core business revolves around pawn loans—non-recourse loans secured by pledged personal property—allowing customers to borrow money quickly without credit checks. Beyond lending, they operate a substantial retail business buying and selling jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. The company also offers specialized services including gold/precious metal buying, layaway plans with 10% down payments, and through its AFF subsidiary, lease-to-own and retail finance solutions across 15,000+ merchant partner locations nationwide.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its unmatched scale and infrastructure. With over 3,300 locations, they offer convenience and inventory depth that local pawn shops cannot match. The company employs approximately 22,000 people globally and maintains listings in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating institutional-grade operations and financial stability. Their dual business model—combining pawn lending with retail merchandise sales and fintech payment solutions—diversifies revenue and creates operational efficiencies unavailable to smaller competitors.

Pawn loans remain fundamentally high-cost borrowing despite being faster and credit-agnostic. Interest rates on pawn loans, while not disclosed on FirstCash's website, typically range from 10-25% monthly (120-300% annualized), making them expensive compared to personal loans or credit lines. Additionally, defaulting on a pawn loan results in permanent loss of the pledged item with no recourse to recover it, creating real financial and emotional risk. FirstCash's massive reach and brand recognition come with the reality that pawn lending is a last-resort borrowing option best used only when truly necessary.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America provide maximum convenience and accessibility
No credit check required—serves unbanked and credit-constrained consumers immediately
Fast funding with same-day cash payout upon item pledge approval
Non-recourse loans mean no debt collection or credit reporting if you default (item forfeiture only)
Buy and sell diverse merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, and instruments
Layaway service available with just 10% down payment for installment purchases
Gold and precious metal buying at competitive spot prices paid in cash on the spot
S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 indexed company indicates institutional stability and transparency
cons: Pawn loan interest rates typically 10-25% monthly (120-300% annualized)—extremely expensive compared to personal loans or credit cards
Default results in permanent forfeiture of pledged items with no recourse or payment plan options
No ability to refinance or recover items after loan term expires, creating harsh consequences for temporary cash needs
Retail merchandise quality and pricing not standardized across 3,300 locations, creating variable customer experience
Website does not disclose specific APR/interest rates, loan terms, or fee structures upfront
best_for: Unbanked or credit-constrained consumers needing emergency cash within hours without credit approval
People with high-value personal items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) willing to pledge collateral temporarily
Consumers seeking to buy used merchandise at discounts through FirstCash's retail locations
Individuals wanting to sell gold, silver, or platinum jewelry for immediate cash payment
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or severely credit-constrained consumers who own valuable personal items and need emergency cash within hours without a credit check. The critical caveat is that pawn loans carry interest rates of 10-25% monthly, making them expensive short-term solutions, and defaulting results in permanent loss of your pledged item with no recourse—use only when truly desperate for immediate cash.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property
Retail merchandise sales (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying and evaluation
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Buy and sell services for items of value
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Online store locator to find nearest FirstCash location
Pawn FAQs and educational resources about pawn lending
In-store and online shopping for used merchandise
